description: Analysts ask how fuel hedge coverage, average hedge price and spot sensitivity translate into per-share EPS impact, and reconcile guidance moves against fuel/FX headwinds.

2022-Q3: non-fuel expense per PCD vs 2019 once one-time COVID costs roll off
2024-Q4: EPS guide better than expected despite FX and fuel headwinds -- what offsets are embedded

analyst_affinity.robin farley: Strips fuel out to focus on underlying non-fuel expense per PCD versus 2019 scale and efficiency.
analyst_affinity.steven wieczynski: Reconciles EPS guide against quantified FX and fuel headwinds and asks what offsets (buybacks, refis) close the gap.

default_framing_options: hedge percent coverage and average hedge price for the forward year
$/share EPS sensitivity to spot fuel move
reconcile fuel headwind ($0.62 vs $0.74 type figures) against EPS guide
